Class CounterfactualSimulator

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.social.history.CounterfactualSimulator
public final class CounterfactualSimulator extends Object
Simulates counterfactual historical scenarios ("What if?"). Analyzes historical contingency and potential alternative timelines based on causal chains. Modernized to use Real for internal weights and divergence factors.
Since:
1.0
Version:
1.2
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    CounterfactualSimulator.ContingencyEvent
    Internal representation of a historical event with its causal dependencies.
    static final record 
    CounterfactualSimulator.CounterfactualScenario
    Defines a specific counterfactual scenario starting from a divergence point.
    static final record 
    CounterfactualSimulator.SimulationResult
    The analytical results of a counterfactual simulation.

    Populates the database with sample historical dataset for simulation testing.

    Simulates the cascade effects of a counterfactual scenario.
